scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test:run --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
